_comment: Single source of truth for the marginal-emissions merit-order rule. Loaded by BOTH lib/marginal.ts (live values) and scripts/marginal.py (stored series) so the two implementations cannot drift. Factors are the official Carbon Intensity API values, gCO2/kWh. meritOrder is most-expensive-to-run first; a fuel must hold at least shareThresholdPct of the mix to be deemed on the margin.
